steps.title: Read the costs bar
steps.content: The question asks for the percentage of participants who mentioned costs. On the graph, the bar for costs reaches the 50 percent gridline, indicating about half of the participants.

steps.title: Match the graph value
steps.content: A is much too low, B matches the tallest bar rather than the costs bar, and C matches a lower bar for a different factor. The costs bar is about 50 percent. The answer is D.
